response.step_by_step_log: I identified two songs in the video. The first, '愛マスカレード', appeared in the top-left corner at the start. The second, 'Don't say 'lazy'', was shown in the lower-third text during the performance. I performed a search for both. The first song, '愛マスカレード', returned no distinct lyrics as it appears to be an original Hololive production without widely available public lyrics. The second, 'Don't say 'lazy'', is the well-known ending theme from the anime K-ON!, and I retrieved the Japanese lyrics and English translation for it.
response.global_summary: A medley performance by Hololive Indonesia members, starting with an original song titled '愛マスカレード' (Ai Masquerade) followed by a cover of the anime K-ON! ending theme 'Don't say 'lazy''.

scenes.description: Hololive Indonesia members perform a choreographed dance to the song '愛マスカレード' (Ai Masquerade). Title appears in the top-left corner.
The performance transitions to a cover of the song 'Don't say 'lazy'' from the anime K-ON!. Artist and title text appear in the bottom-center.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Please don't say "You are lazy"
Datte hontou wa crazy
Hakuchoutachi wa sou
Mienai toko de BATAashi suru n desu
Honnou ni juujun chuujitsu
Honrou mo juujuu shouchi
Zentou youyou dashi
Dakara tama ni kyuukei shichaun desu
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Please don't say "You are lazy"
'Cause the truth is, I'm crazy
Swans, you see,
Are kicking their feet underwater where you can't see them
I'm obedient and faithful to my instincts
I'm also fully aware of the ups and downs
The future is bright
So sometimes, I just have to take a break
